conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: For the data warehouse, let's use Snowflake. It's cloud-native and handles large datasets well.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: Snowflake is enterprise-grade. I'll set up the virtual warehouses.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Snowflake is expensive. Let's use BigQuery. It's faster and has better integration with Google Cloud.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: BigQuery is serverless. I'll migrate the data pipeline.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: We need to keep costs low. Let's use Redshift. It has a predictable pricing model.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: Redshift is more affordable for our data volume. I'll set up the clusters.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I've been using Databricks. It has excellent SQL and ML capabilities. Let's use Databricks.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: Databricks is a unified platform. I'll set up the Delta Lake.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: We need real-time analytics. Let's use ClickHouse. It's the fastest for OLAP.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: ClickHouse is impressive. I'll deploy it on our cloud.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: We already have BigQuery credits. Let's just use BigQuery. It's good enough and we have budget constraints.

query: What data warehouse solution is the team using for analytics?
